title: What is an Array?
description: Store multiple values in a single variable.

slides.title: Arrays: Lists of Things 📋
Creating Arrays

quizData.question: Which of the following is the correct way to create an array in modern PHP?
quizData.explanation: Both `array(1,2,3)` and `[1,2,3]` are valid, but `[]` is the modern short syntax. The question asks for correct way, so we choose the short syntax as it's the recommended one.
